class.name: Skeleton2D
class.brief_description: The parent of a hierarchy of [Bone2D]s, used to create a 2D skeletal animation.
class.description: [Skeleton2D] parents a hierarchy of [Bone2D] nodes. It holds each bone rest pose and acts as a single point of access to runtime bone poses. To modify bones procedurally, add [SkeletonModifier2D] child nodes to the [Skeleton2D]. Modifiers are processed by the skeleton in a deferred update.

method.name: advance
method.description: Manually advances child [SkeletonModifier2D] nodes by the specified time in seconds.

method.name: clear_bone_local_pose_override
method.description: Clears the local pose override for [param bone_idx].

method.name: get_bone_count
method.description: Returns the number of [Bone2D] nodes in this skeleton.

method.name: get_bone_global_pose
method.description: Returns the current skeleton-space global pose for [param bone_idx].

method.name: get_bone_local_pose_override
method.description: Returns the local pose override transform for [param bone_idx].

method.name: get_bone_parent
method.description: Returns the parent bone index for [param idx], or [code]-1[/code] if the bone has no parent.

method.name: get_bone_pose
method.description: Returns the current local pose for [param bone_idx].

method.name: get_modifier_callback_mode_process
method.description: Returns when child [SkeletonModifier2D] nodes are processed.

method.name: set_bone_global_pose
method.description: Sets the skeleton-space global pose for [param bone_idx].

method.name: set_bone_local_pose_override
method.description: Sets the local pose override for [param bone_idx].

method.name: set_bone_pose
method.description: Sets the local pose for [param bone_idx].

method.name: set_modifier_callback_mode_process
method.description: Sets when child [SkeletonModifier2D] nodes are processed.

members.member: Sets the processing timing for child [SkeletonModifier2D] nodes.

signal.name: bone_setup_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the [Bone2D] setup attached to this skeleton changes.

constants.constant: Notification received when this skeleton needs to update its pose.
Process child [SkeletonModifier2D] nodes during physics frames.
Process child [SkeletonModifier2D] nodes during process frames.
Do not process child [SkeletonModifier2D] nodes automatically. Use [method advance] to process them manually.
